languages.text: Саркофаг, на котором вырезано имя Себериана, пуст. В нем нет никаких следов захоронения — словно бы склеп так и не дождался тела фон Валанциуса.
The sarcophagus on which Seberian's name is carved is empty. Inside, it looks completely untouched, as if von Valancius's body never entered the crypt.
languages.original_text: Саркофаг, на котором вырезано имя Себериана, пуст. В нем нет никаких следов захоронения — словно бы склеп так и не дождался тела фон Валанциуса.

traits.locale_text: The sarcophagus on which Seberian's name is carved is empty. Inside, it looks completely untouched, as if von Valancius's body never entered the crypt.
The sarcophagus on which Seberian's name is carved is empty. Inside, it looks completely untouched, as if von Valancius's body never entered the crypt.
The sarcophagus on which Seberian's name is carved is empty. Inside, it looks completely untouched, as if von Valancius's body never entered the crypt.

languages.text: シベリアンの名前が刻まれた棺は空っぽだった。内部は全く触れられていないようだった。まるでフォン・ヴァランキウスの遺体がこの地下墓に持ち込まれたことがないかのように。
languages.original_text: The sarcophagus on which Seberian's name is carved is empty. Inside, it looks completely untouched, as if von Valancius's body never entered the crypt.

traits.locale_text: シベリアンの名前が刻まれた棺は空っぽだった。内部は全く触れられていないようだった。まるでフォン・ヴァランキウスの遺体がこの地下墓に持ち込まれたことがないかのように。

languages.text: Üzerinde Seberian'ın adının kazılı olduğu lahdin içi boş. İçi, sanki von Valancius'un cesedi mahzene hiç girmemiş gibi bütünüyle el değmemiş duruyor.
languages.original_text: The sarcophagus on which Seberian's name is carved is empty. Inside, it looks completely untouched, as if von Valancius's body never entered the crypt.

traits.locale_text: Üzerinde Seberian'ın adının kazılı olduğu lahdin içi boş. İçi, sanki von Valancius'un cesedi mahzene hiç girmemiş gibi bütünüyle el değmemiş duruyor.

languages.text: El sarcófago en el que está grabado el nombre de Seberian está vacío. Por dentro parece totalmente intacto, como si el cuerpo de von Valancius jamás hubiera llegado a la cripta.
languages.original_text: The sarcophagus on which Seberian's name is carved is empty. Inside, it looks completely untouched, as if von Valancius's body never entered the crypt.

traits.locale_text: El sarcófago en el que está grabado el nombre de Seberian está vacío. Por dentro parece totalmente intacto, como si el cuerpo de von Valancius jamás hubiera llegado a la cripta.

languages.text: 刻有塞贝里安名字的石棺是空的，内部看起来毫无动过的痕迹，仿佛冯·瓦兰修斯的遗体从未被安放在这座墓穴中。
languages.original_text: The sarcophagus on which Seberian's name is carved is empty. Inside, it looks completely untouched, as if von Valancius's body never entered the crypt.

traits.locale_text: 刻有塞贝里安名字的石棺是空的，内部看起来毫无动过的痕迹，仿佛冯·瓦兰修斯的遗体从未被安放在这座墓穴中。

languages.text: Il n'y a rien à l'intérieur du sarcophage sur lequel est gravé le nom de Seberian. Il semble parfaitement intact, comme s'il n'avait jamais accueilli la dépouille du libre-marchand.
languages.original_text: The sarcophagus on which Seberian's name is carved is empty. Inside, it looks completely untouched, as if von Valancius's body never entered the crypt.

traits.locale_text: Il n'y a rien à l'intérieur du sarcophage sur lequel est gravé le nom de Seberian. Il semble parfaitement intact, comme s'il n'avait jamais accueilli la dépouille du libre-marchand.

languages.text: Der Sarkophag mit Seberians Name ist leer. Er scheint absolut unberührt zu sein, als wäre von Valancius' Leichnam nie in der Krypta gewesen.
languages.original_text: The sarcophagus on which Seberian's name is carved is empty. Inside, it looks completely untouched, as if von Valancius's body never entered the crypt.

traits.locale_text: Der Sarkophag mit Seberians Name ist leer. Er scheint absolut unberührt zu sein, als wäre von Valancius' Leichnam nie in der Krypta gewesen.
